steps.title: Compute the result
steps.content:
Multiply then add.
$$f(-8)=24+60=84$$
That matches choice D — D is correct.

steps.title: Use the source rationale
steps.content: Choice D is correct. The value of $f\left(x\right)$ when $x=-8$ can be found by substituting $-8$ for $x$ in the given function. This yields $f\left(-8\right)=-3\left(-8\right)+60$, or $f\left(-8\right)=84$. Therefore, when $x=-8$, the value of $f\left(x\right)$ is $84$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice A is incorrect. This is the value of $\left(-3+\left(-8\right)\right)+60$, not $-3\left(-8\right)+60$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice B is incorrect. This is the value of $-8+60$, not $-3\left(-8\right)+60$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice C is incorrect. This is the value of $-3+60$, not $-3\left(-8\right)+60$.
